# AI use case register format

**Purpose:** A public, on-chain record of every AI tool and practice used at Future's Edge. Updated continuously. Anyone can view it.

***

### AI use case register entry template

**Record ID:** [Auto-generated on approval]  
**Status:** ☐ Active  ☐ Under review  ☐ Suspended  ☐ Retired

***

#### Basic information

**Tool or practice name:**

_______________________________________________________________

**Plain-language description** (what it does, in one sentence):

_______________________________________________________________

**Category:**

☐ Governance (voting, proposals, reputation)  
☐ Learning (recommendations, feedback, assessment)  
☐ Community (moderation, matching, communication)  
☐ Operations (admin, scheduling, analytics)  
☐ Economic (compensation, bounty calculation, verification)  
☐ Content (generation, curation, translation)

***

#### Accountability

**Named tool owner:**

Name: _______________  
Role: _______________  
Contact: _______________

**Human oversight mechanism:**

☐ Manual review of all decisions  
☐ Sampling-based review (frequency: _______________)  
☐ Automated alerts for threshold events  
☐ Regular audit trail review  
☐ Other: _______________

***

#### Data and privacy

**What data does this tool use?**

_______________________________________________________________

**Data retention period:**

_______________________________________________________________

**Can members view their data?** ☐ Yes ☐ No  
**Can members request deletion?** ☐ Yes ☐ No ☐ Partial

***

#### Bias and inclusion

**Bias audit status:**

Last audit date: _______________  
Next audit due: _______________  
Audit outcome: ☐ No disparities detected ☐ Disparities detected (see notes)

**Performance tested across:**

☐ Gender  ☐ Language  ☐ Geography  ☐ Cultural background  ☐ Socioeconomic status

**Notes or remediation actions:**

_______________________________________________________________

***

**CIA completed:** ☐ Yes — Date: _______________

**Stakeholder groups affected:**

☐ Emerging economy participants  
☐ Small business / clients

☐ Local communities  
☐ Staff / contractors

***

☐ Yes — Process: _______________

**Number upheld:** _______________
